'''Marter An''' was the capital of [[Sheris]]. This city had a [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]].

==Characteristics==
Marter An was built in the mountains of the planet. The [[Bhir'khi Pass]] was one of the only access path to the city.<ref name="SWAJ9" />

==History==
During the [[Thrawn campaign]], the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces [[Battle of Sheris|fought]] in the Bhir'khi Pass in order to control the access to the capital.<ref name="SWAJ9" />

==Appearances==
*{{JournalCite|9|Stand at Bhir'khi Pass|reprint=1}} {{1st}}
